title: Mohabbatein
tmdbOverview: At a prestigious all-male university, three friends seek love outside of the school grounds; at the same time, a newly-hired music teacher seeks to befriend and loosen up the militantly strict headmaster.
synopsis: Mohabbatein is a 2000 drama and romance film from India. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
